channel.title: GitHub R Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of R in GitHub

item.title: rmaia/pavo
item.description: tools for the analysis of color data in R

item.title: chris-mcginnis-ucsf/DoubletFinder
item.description: R package for detecting doublets in single-cell RNA sequencing data

item.title: joey711/phyloseq
item.description: phyloseq is a set of classes, wrappers, and tools (in R) to make it easier to import, store, and analyze phylogenetic sequencing data; and to reproducibly share that data and analysis with others. See the phyloseq front page:

item.title: tidyverse/ggplot2
item.description: An implementation of the Grammar of Graphics in R

item.title: benjjneb/dada2
item.description: Accurate sample inference from amplicon data with single nucleotide resolution

item.title: MRCIEU/TwoSampleMR
item.description: R package for performing 2-sample MR using MR-Base database

item.title: swirldev/swirl_courses
item.description: 🎓 A collection of interactive courses for the swirl R package.

item.title: sqjin/CellChat
item.description: R toolkit for inference, visualization and analysis of cell-cell communication from single-cell data

item.title: mojaveazure/seurat-disk
item.description: Interfaces for HDF5-based Single Cell File Formats

item.title: YuLab-SMU/clusterProfiler
item.description: 📊 A universal enrichment tool for interpreting omics data

item.title: karthik/wesanderson
item.description: A Wes Anderson color palette for R
